title: Rebuild Follow-Ups page with editable message templates as primary focus

requirements.summary: Redesign the FollowUpsPage component to display message templates as the primary content, replacing the current customer list view with a template-focused layout
acceptanceCriteria: The Follow-Ups page displays message templates prominently as the main content
The previous customer list view is removed or moved to a secondary position
The page layout is clean and organized for easy template management

file_operations.description: Restructure the page layout to prioritize message templates over the customer list. Move customer list to a collapsible or secondary section. Create a clean grid or vertical stack layout for displaying multiple message template cards prominently.

requirements.summary: Display all four message template types simultaneously on the Follow-Ups page: post-job satisfaction (3-7 days after completion), 6-month mold prevention check-in, seasonal check-ins (spring moisture season and fall prep), and Google review request template
acceptanceCriteria: Post-job satisfaction template is visible with description indicating 3-7 days after completion timing
6-month mold prevention check-in template is visible
Seasonal check-ins templates are visible (spring moisture season and fall prep)
Google review request template is visible
All four template types are displayed on the same page without requiring selection

file_operations.description: Create a reusable card component for displaying individual message templates. Include props for template title, description, default message text, and timing information. Use shadcn/ui Card components for consistent styling with the earth-tone theme.

Add four MessageTemplateCard instances for: post-job satisfaction (3-7 days after completion), 6-month mold prevention check-in, seasonal check-ins (spring moisture season and fall prep), and Google review request. Display all templates simultaneously without tabs or selection. Include descriptive headers and timing information for each template type.

requirements.summary: Implement editable text areas for each message template on the Follow-Ups page that allow users to customize the template content in real-time
acceptanceCriteria: Each template has an editable text area that displays the current template content
Users can modify template text directly in the text area
Changes to template text are reflected immediately in the interface
Text areas are appropriately sized for message content

file_operations.description: Add an editable textarea element using shadcn/ui Textarea component. Manage local state for template text with useState. Ensure textarea is appropriately sized (minimum 4-6 rows) and includes proper styling for the earth-tone theme. Handle onChange events to update the text in real-time.

requirements.summary: Add a preview section for each message template that displays the formatted message with customer name placeholders and shows how the message will appear when sent
acceptanceCriteria: Each template includes a preview section showing the formatted message
Preview displays placeholders like [Customer Name] to indicate customization points
Preview updates dynamically as template text is edited
Preview is visually distinct from the editable text area

file_operations.description: Add a preview section below or beside the editable textarea. Display the formatted message text with placeholders like [Customer Name] replaced or highlighted. Use a distinct visual style (different background color, border, or card styling) to differentiate from the editable area. Update the preview dynamically as the textarea content changes using the template text state.

requirements.summary: Add a copy-to-clipboard button for each message template that copies the formatted message text and displays a success notification when the copy operation completes
acceptanceCriteria: Each template has a clearly labeled copy-to-clipboard button
Clicking the button copies the formatted message text to the clipboard
A success notification appears after successful copy operation
The button provides visual feedback when clicked

file_operations.description: Add a copy-to-clipboard button using shadcn/ui Button component with a copy icon. Implement clipboard API functionality to copy the formatted message text. Add a success toast notification using shadcn/ui toast/sonner when copy succeeds. Provide visual feedback on the button (icon change or loading state) during the copy operation.

requirements.summary: Create default message template text for post-job satisfaction that requests customer feedback 3-7 days after job completion, including placeholders for customer name and customizable content
acceptanceCriteria: Template includes friendly greeting with customer name placeholder
Message references recent mold remediation service
Requests feedback or satisfaction confirmation
Tone is professional and appreciative

file_operations.description: Create a data file exporting default message template objects. Define a template for post-job satisfaction with a professional, appreciative tone. Include greeting with [Customer Name] placeholder, reference to recent mold remediation service, request for feedback, and appropriate closing. Example: 'Hi [Customer Name], we hope you're satisfied with the mold remediation work we completed at your property. We'd love to hear your feedback about our service. Please let us know if everything met your expectations or if there's anything we can improve. Thank you for trusting Phoenix Shield with your mold prevention needs.'

Import the post-job satisfaction template from messageTemplates.ts and pass it as the default text to the corresponding MessageTemplateCard. Include descriptive label and timing information (3-7 days after completion).

requirements.summary: Create default message template text for 6-month mold prevention check-in that reminds customers about preventive maintenance and offers a check-in appointment, including placeholders for customer name
acceptanceCriteria: Template emphasizes importance of preventive maintenance
Message offers to schedule a check-in appointment
Content is helpful and positions the business as proactive
Includes customer name placeholder

file_operations.description: Add a 6-month mold prevention check-in template that emphasizes preventive maintenance importance and offers to schedule a check-in appointment. Use helpful, proactive tone with [Customer Name] placeholder. Example: 'Hi [Customer Name], it's been 6 months since we completed your mold remediation service. We recommend a preventive check-in to ensure everything is still in great condition. Would you like to schedule a quick inspection to catch any potential issues early? Let us know a time that works for you!'
Import the 6-month prevention template from messageTemplates.ts and pass it to the corresponding MessageTemplateCard with appropriate label and description.

requirements.summary: Create default message template text for seasonal check-ins covering spring moisture season and fall prep, with messaging appropriate for each season's mold prevention needs and customer name placeholders
acceptanceCriteria: Spring template addresses moisture concerns typical of spring season
Fall template addresses preparation for winter and moisture control
Both templates offer seasonal inspection or consultation
Templates include customer name placeholders

file_operations.description: Add two seasonal check-in templates: one for spring moisture season and one for fall prep. Spring template should address moisture concerns typical of spring (rain, humidity, flooding). Fall template should address winter preparation and moisture control. Both should offer seasonal inspections with [Customer Name] placeholders. Examples: Spring: 'Hi [Customer Name], spring brings increased moisture that can lead to mold growth. We'd like to offer a seasonal inspection to check for any moisture issues before they become problems. Contact us to schedule your spring mold prevention check!' Fall: 'Hi [Customer Name], as we prepare for winter, now is the perfect time to ensure your property is protected from moisture and mold. We're offering fall prep inspections to help you stay ahead of any potential issues. Let's schedule a time that works for you!'
Import both seasonal templates (spring and fall) from messageTemplates.ts and pass them to separate MessageTemplateCard instances with appropriate seasonal labels and descriptions.

requirements.summary: Create default message template text for Google review request that politely asks customers to leave a review with a placeholder for the business Google review link and customer name
acceptanceCriteria: Template includes friendly request for Google review
Message expresses appreciation for customer's business
Includes clear placeholder for Google review link insertion
Tone is polite and not overly pushy

file_operations.description: Add a Google review request template with polite, appreciative tone. Include [Customer Name] and [Google Review Link] placeholders. Example: 'Hi [Customer Name], thank you for choosing Phoenix Shield for your mold remediation needs. We truly appreciate your business! If you were satisfied with our service, we'd be grateful if you could share your experience with a Google review. Your feedback helps us serve our community better. [Google Review Link]. Thank you!'
Import the Google review request template from messageTemplates.ts and pass it to the corresponding MessageTemplateCard with appropriate label indicating it's for review requests.
